lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: You look like somebody who could use a bit of armour. What do you say?

lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: Maybe I overestimated you. I suppose such fine equipment isn't for everyone.

lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: You don't have anything I can repair.

lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: There you go, happy doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: There you go, happy doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Aneirin
lines.text: Sorry friend, but I can't do anything with that.
